content.en:
Although the human race doesn't know much about the Yuangu Palace, it happens to have some understanding of the second round of assessment of the Yuangu Palace, including the normal-level difficulty, the hard-level difficulty and the hell-level difficulty, these three difficulties are actually not too life-threatening, even if they fail, they can come out safely.

But the death-level difficulty and the anti-heaven level difficulty are life-threatening, if the strength is not enough, forcibly breaking through these two difficulties is tantamount to looking for death!

As for the rewards obtained after overcoming these five difficulties, the Terrans are not clear, after all, the Terrans have not come to the Yuangu Order, and they are all news that they have traded or probed from other universe clans, but it is very difficult to get specific news.

Ye Tian pondered for a long time, ordinary level difficulty and hard level difficulty, he would not choose these two difficulties, because there was no challenge at all.

For him, the hell-level difficulty is a bit of a thing, but the most he wants to challenge is the death-level difficulty and the anti-heaven level difficulty, but because he is not clear about the standards of the latter two difficulties, it is naturally not good to challenge rashly, otherwise once he fails, he may pay the price of his life.

"Death-level difficulty!"

Ye Tian finally chose this difficulty.

The reason why he didn't choose the anti-heaven level difficulty was not because he was afraid, but because it was unnecessary, if he could break through the death-level difficulty, he would have another chance to choose again.

If the death-level difficulty was not difficult for him, he would naturally choose the anti-heaven difficulty.

Wow!

Ye Tian stepped into the portal corresponding to the difficulty level and entered an unknown place.

......

Ye Tian didn't know what the difficulty level difficulty assessment was facing, so as soon as he teleported in, he immediately opened a door defense method to prevent unexpected situations from happening.

"This is ......"

Ye Tian found himself in an extremely desolate wilderness, where there was no grass and trees, only endless desolation.

The sky is yellow, the earth is parched, and there are broken weapons everywhere, as if it were an ancient battlefield of desolation and endless years.

Ye Tian didn't find any assessments, nor did he have any hints, which were completely different from the various serendipitous assessments he had encountered before.

Ye Tian saw a broken spear not far away, and stepped forward to touch it.

In an instant, the broken spear turned to ashes.

"It seems that this broken spear has existed for countless years, and its strength has been exhausted, and it cannot offset the passage of time, and it has become ashes!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But just as he was about to leave, his face suddenly changed.

He looked at his palm, and a faint green dot appeared on the originally white and tender palm, and the green dot was still spreading.

"Poison?"

This was Ye Tian's first thought, but soon, he decided that it was not poison.

Ordinary poison has no effect on him, the truly terrifying poison contains the law of poison, and there is no law of poison in this green dot, but a very strange aura, beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

For the first time, Ye Tian turned on the healing talent, life talent, immortal talent and other talents, trying to restore the palm, although the green dot was suppressed, it did not disappear completely.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian directly amputated his palm, and then used the regeneration talent and healing talent to instantly regenerate a palm.

And the palm that fell to the ground was quickly covered with green dots and became a green palm.

"This world is not simple!"

Ye Tian was solemn.

If an ordinary Constant-level Highness came here, with the situation just now, maybe he would have stopped eating directly.

"What the hell is this green dot?"

Ye Tian stood in front of the green palm, carefully examined it, and even used his divine sense to probe little by little, analyzing the substance contained in the green dot.

"Similar to the power of a curse, is it a rare poisonous curse?"

Ye Tian guessed.

The poison curse is not poison, but it has a poisonous effect, it will spread, and it will not dissipate for a long time, and once you touch it, you will also be hit, which is an incomparably terrible curse power.

This green dot is different from the normal poison spell, but it can be seen as a mutant poison spell, which is even more terrifying!

Knowing the horror of this poisonous curse, Ye Tian naturally wouldn't touch things indiscriminately, he directly used a protective shield and various defensive means to protect himself from being invaded by this poisonous curse.

Immediately.

Ye Tian walked on this ancient battlefield and looked around.

Since this is a place for death-level difficulty assessment, it can't be such a situation, there will definitely be some terrible things or things that will appear.

"It's coming!"

Ye Tian felt the shaking of the earth, and it seemed that something was about to come out of the ground of this ancient battlefield.

Rumble!!!!

One after another, green figures rushed out of the ground and slashed towards Ye Tian at an extremely fast speed.

The dense figure seems to cover the heavens and the earth, and there are too many of them.

"Cursed creatures!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

These creatures are all green, which is not the color of their skin, but they have been invaded by a poison curse, or they are simply creatures born with the power of a poison curse.

The cultivation of these creatures is roughly the same, they are all at the level of the ninth order of the god level, but the combat power is different.

Now, there are thousands of creatures attacking Ye Tian densely, and they can't be attacked by this kind of creature to the flesh, otherwise with the spread speed of this poisonous curse, it will definitely invade Ye Tian's body, and it will be difficult to get rid of it.

Ye Tian cast the Ten Thousand Realms, blocked these green creatures with the Ten Thousand Boundaries, and then cast the Void Spirit Golden Silk Divine Power.

Although the attack power of the Void Spirit Golden Silk Divine Power is not strong, it is fast and can form a large number of Void Spirit Gold Wires, which is very good in harvesting enemies.

And Ye Tian just tested the strength of these creatures, it was not bad to use the Void Spirit Golden Silk Divine Power.

Puff puff puff!!

A green creature was cut into many levels by the ethereal golden wire, turned into corpses one by one, and fell to the ground.

"So weak!"

Ye Tian sighed.

In fact, the strength of these green creatures was comparable to the ninth order of the god level achieved by the Nine-Star Peerless Tianjiao, and it was not weak, but for Ye Tian, these green creatures were too weak.

In the blink of an eye, all of these green creatures were killed by Ye Tian, and not a single green creature was allowed to leave.

At the same time, Ye Tian also used the copy talent to check the talent of the green creature.

These green creatures are just average creatures, with a variety of different types of talents, and while they have good talents, they don't have any talents related to poison spells.

Obviously, the power of the Poison Spell contained in these green creatures is infected, which is why they carry the power of the Poison Spell, not the power of the Poison Spell attached to their own talents.

Ye Tian was not happy after killing these green creatures, he knew very well that this green creature was just an appetizer, and the death-level difficulty would not be the only one.

Suddenly.

These green creatures turned into ashes, and countless green substances flew into the distance, as if guiding Ye Tian.

Ye Tian hesitated, but still chased after him.

If he didn't go over, he didn't know how to complete this death-level difficulty assessment, could it be that he had been waiting here all along?

Rather than this, it is better to face the assessment directly.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew quickly, and soon came to an ancient stone statue.

And the green material flew in front of the stone statue and merged into the stone statue.

"Divine Source Crystal!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This stone statue turned out to be the legendary Divine Source Crystal, which is rumored to be a treasure that can seal life and prolong lifespan, such as the original 100,000-year-old seal of His Royal Highness of the Human Race, and the lifespan has not decreased much, and it is the Divine Source Crystal.

The Divine Source Crystal is the most common sealing thing in the universe, and many big people will also use the Divine Source Crystal to seal themselves when they have a short lifespan.

You must know that normal creatures use Divine Source Crystals, which are basically weak and small, sealed in the smallest state, and are only a thin layer of Divine Source Crystals, so they don't dare to use too much.

And this stone statue is too big, and you can imagine how many Divine Source Crystals are used.

"There can't be some kind of terrifying powerhouse sealed inside, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

But thinking about it, it's unlikely, what he is facing is just a god-level assessment, even if the difficulty reaches the death-level difficulty, it is impossible for that kind of terrifying powerhouse to appear.

Moreover, the Yuangu Hall is a temple several epochs ago, and it is unlikely that there will be life here a few epochs ago, and even those green creatures just now are actually cultivated in this cosmic era.

The Yuan Gu Hall has a machine spirit, and it is not difficult for the machine spirit to cultivate some creatures by itself.

Even if there is life in this Divine Source Crystal Statue, it is only a god-level life, and it is cultivated in this cosmic era, so it cannot be a terrifying powerhouse a few epochs ago.

Click!!

The Divine Source Crystal began to crack after absorbing the green substance.

Ye Tian stepped back a little and stared at this Divine Source Crystal Statue!
